description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house set within a walled urban lot, surrounded by a landscaped garden with several mature trees and shrubs. The house features a mix of white and stone-textured exterior walls, large rectangular windows, and a rooftop terrace with glass railings. There is a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side, and a cylindrical water tank is visible in the backyard. The property includes a small wooden shed or doghouse in one corner and a paved walkway encircling the house. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and natural light. The lot is enclosed by a low stone wall with a metal gate at the front.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, stone and white walls, surrounded by landscaped gardens and a low stone wall. Features include a rooftop terrace, carport, and backyard water tank.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, rooftop terrace, and landscaped front yard with a stone wall and gate.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, water tank, mature trees, and a small wooden shed or doghouse.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the house's length, stone-textured walls, and the integration of the rooftop terrace and garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, carport, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, and a paved approach behind a low stone wall and metal gate.
